description: accepts= value is not an enum type (§51.0.S.2.2 / §51.0.S.4). accepts=MyErr references a declared type that is an `:error`, not an `:enum`. The accepts= message vocabulary must resolve to a declared :enum, so E-ENGINE-ACCEPTS-NOT-ENUM fires (the §34 error partition).
rationale: §51.0.S.2.2 if the accepts= value does not resolve to a declared :enum type, E-ENGINE-ACCEPTS-NOT-ENUM fires.
